allow:
Bash(git add \\
  README.md \\
  lib/sleeper_ff/client.rb \\
  lib/sleeper_ff/client/leagues.rb \\
  lib/sleeper_ff/client/drafts.rb \\
  lib/sleeper_ff/draft.rb \\
  lib/sleeper_ff/league.rb \\
  spec/sleeper_ff/client/leagues_spec.rb \\
  spec/sleeper_ff/client/drafts_spec.rb \\
  spec/fixtures/vcr_cassettes/SleeperFF_Client_Drafts/ \\
  spec/fixtures/vcr_cassettes/SleeperFF_Client_Leagues/_league_drafts/ \\
  .claude/ && \\
git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add draft endpoints with League and Draft resource objects

Implements all Sleeper draft API endpoints:
- GET /user/:id/drafts/nfl/:season via client.user_drafts
- GET /draft/:id via client.draft
- GET /draft/:id/picks via client.draft_picks / draft.picks
- GET /draft/:id/traded_picks via client.draft_traded_picks / draft.traded_picks
- GET /league/:id/drafts via client.league_drafts / league.drafts

Introduces SleeperFF::League and SleeperFF::Draft resource classes that
wrap raw API data and expose lazy association methods \(e.g. league.drafts,
draft.picks\) without additional HTTP calls until accessed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
